idx_customer_entitlements_next_reset_not.name: idx_customer_entitlements_next_reset_not_expired
idx_customer_entitlements_next_reset_not.where: "customer_entitlements"."expired" IS NOT TRUE AND "customer_entitlements"."next_reset_at" IS NOT NULL

customers_email_null_id_unique.name: customers_email_null_id_unique
customers_email_null_id_unique.where: "customers"."id" IS NULL AND "customers"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "customers"."email" != ''
